Transient: Following the rite of succession, the people of Mamook have been making greater efforts to reach out to other communities, although it is still passing strange that a messenger from the city has come to you requesting aid. A pall of unease has settled over Yak T'el, the howl of ill tidings echoing through the trees. What mysteries await there in the heart of the woods?

**Certain delivery objectives will be completed automatically.**
If there's one code XRral Soj lives by, it's to never keep a customer waiting. Essential metalwares are her expertise, and having them ready in a timely fashion is a matter of pride. Her new assistant Papawni, however, is a former potsworn who prefers a more elaborate process, specializing in lavish novelties. You must help these two complete opposites work in tandem by lighting the spark of collaboration between them, and hope that given time, they may forge an unbreakable bond of trust.
